Boulder constructs the CRL URL from configured CRLURLBase (issuance/issuer.go:236-243, crl.go:77-79). Whether that exactly matches CCADB-disclosed CRL URLs is an operational/config concern, not visible in code.
issuance/cert.go:198-219 marshals the SCT list as cttls bytes, wraps it in asn1 OCTET STRING form (asn1.Marshal of listBytes produces an OCTET STRING).
DV only - Boulder issues only DV certs with no subscriber info beyond CN matching SAN.
Applies to OV certs only; LE issues only DV.
issuance/cert.go:300-309 only ever sets ServerAuth + optional ClientAuth.
Boulder never sets IsCA on subscriber templates, so cA=FALSE. zlint lint_sub_cert_is_ca enforces.
issuance/cert.go:167-174 hardcodes Policies = [2.23.140.1.2.1] (DV); exactly one CABF Reserved Policy Identifier.
csr.VerifyCSR rejects CSRs with no identifiers (csr/csr.go:85-88). cpcps lint e_cert_has_san_count_out_of_bounds also enforces >=1 SAN.
Same as 4.6.5; the precertificate-signing OID is never added.
issuance/cert.go:188-193 defines the precert poison ext marked critical; issuance/cert.go:198-219 generates the SCT List for final certs.
crypto/x509.CreateCertificate copies issuer.RawSubject as the issued cert's RawIssuer by construction.
Boulder only emits ServerAuth + ClientAuth (issuance/cert.go:300-309), both of which are Microsoft-enabled. No prohibited combos with smartcardLogon/documentSigning.

goodkey enforces E == 65537 (good_key.go:308-310), checks for factors smaller than 752 via checkSmallPrimes (good_key.go:315-317, 358-374), and rejects even moduli via the same small-prime check (2 is in the list).
Boulder does not issue short-lived certs (always sets CRLDP).
issuance/cert.go NewProfile rejects MaxValidityBackdate >= 24h (cert.go:74-76), well under 48h. requestValid also rejects backdates greater than maxBackdate (cert.go:148-154).
Boulder only sets template.Subject.CommonName on subscriber certs (issuance/cert.go:314-316). None of the listed forbidden attributes are ever set.
Go's crypto/x509 emits AIA non-critical. zlint lint_sub_cert_aia_marked_critical / lint_ext_aia_marked_critical enforce.
Same as 4.6.5; OCSPSigning never included.
Boulder does not add any qcStatements or hardware-security claims (no such fields in template).

issuance/cert.go RequestFromPrecert copies precert.SerialNumber.Bytes() into the final cert request (cert.go:419), and precert.Correspond (precert/corr.go:47-51, 28-32) verifies the byte-for-byte serial-number identity before signing the final cert.
Go's crypto/x509 writes explicit NULL parameters for RSASSA-PKCS1-v1_5 sigAlgs. zlint lint_tbs_signature_rsa_encryption_parameter_not_null and lint_spki_rsa_encryption_parameter_not_null enforce.
Go's crypto/x509 uses fixed encodings of named curves; zlint lint_mp_ecdsa_pub_key_encoding_correct verifies hex prefixes.
ra.go:335 caps ValidAuthzLifetime under 89 days, well under 100 days.
Boulder does not add any policyQualifiers, including id-qt-cps (issuance/cert.go:167-183).
Boulder does not set subject serialNumber. zlint lint_subject_dn_serial_number_max_length / not_printable_string enforce.
issuance/cert.go ProfileConfig has OmitSKID (cert.go:43-44). When OmitSKID is true, no SKID is included (cert.go:331-333). Boulder operationally omits SKID per current LE profile.
Go's crypto/x509 emits KeyUsage as critical when KeyUsage is set. zlint lint_ext_key_usage_not_critical enforces.
Boulder issues DV only; the only subject attribute set is CN, which must exactly correspond to a DNS SAN (csr.go:102-126, see also OmitCommonName profile option in issuance/cert.go:36-37).
goodkey/good_key.go:143-150 / 163-170 only accepts *rsa.PublicKey or *ecdsa.PublicKey. issuance/cert.go:121-125 (requestValid) additionally guards at issuance.
Same as 4.5.7: no qualifiers at all. zlint lint_policy_qualifiers_other_than_cps_not_permitted / lint_ext_cert_policy_disallowed_any_policy_qualifier enforce.

Boulder chooses sigAlg deterministically from issuer key type in issuance/issuer.go:212-227 (SHA256WithRSA for RSA issuers, ECDSAWithSHA256/384 for P-256/P-384 issuers). zlint's lint_signature_algorithm_not_supported enforces the BR-permitted set.
Go's crypto/x509 emits BasicConstraints critical. zlint lint_sub_cert_basic_constraints_not_critical enforces.
Boulder's EKU set is exclusively ServerAuth + optional ClientAuth (issuance/cert.go:300-309). codeSigning never added. zlint lint_sub_cert_eku_extra_values / lint_mp_allowed_eku enforce.
Boulder always sets template.DNSNames/IPAddresses from the CSR (issuance/cert.go:317-318). csr.VerifyCSR ensures at least one identifier (csr/csr.go:85-88). zlint lint_ext_san_missing enforces.
Only the DV OID is present, so it is trivially the first PolicyInformation.

policy/pa.go ValidDomain handles the wildcard prefix (pa.go:314-344). The VA enforces DNS-01/dns-account-01/dns-persist-01 challenges only for wildcards (policy/pa.go:610-623). RA's ValidationProfile (ra/ra.go:236-294) and authz reuse logic guarantee a fresh validation per BR 3.2.2.6.

Each IPAddress SAN is bound to a validated authorization that the RA links to the order at issuance time. policy/pa.go ValidIP validates form/scope and reserved-prefix status (pa.go:353-369). VA performs HTTP-01 or TLS-ALPN-01 challenges per RFC 8738.

Boulder never sets countryName on subscriber certs (only CN is set in issuance/cert.go:315). zlint lint_subject_country_not_iso / lint_subject_dn_country_not_printable_string would catch any violation.
Go's crypto/x509 emits AKI non-critical. zlint lint_ext_authority_key_identifier_critical enforces.
Boulder always sets template.CRLDistributionPoints (issuance/cert.go:355) so the CRLDP route is always present.

Boulder lints the precert via linter.Check (issuance/cert.go:359-362) using the full zlint registry plus custom lints; the same constraints apply structurally to the corresponding final cert since precert.Correspond guarantees byte-equality save the poison/SCT swap.

precert/corr.go Correspond enforces byte-for-byte equality except for the poison vs SCT-List swap; called by Issuer.Prepare (issuance/cert.go:364-368) and additionally tbsCertIsDeterministic (ca/ca.go:524-579) checks TBS byte equality between lint cert and real cert.

Whether LE operates a separate Applicant-PKI hierarchy is operational. For its public hierarchy, Boulder includes ClientAuth by default; for private applicant-PKI use, the OmitClientAuth profile option (issuance/cert.go:40-42) supports stripping it.
Go's crypto/x509 uses namedCurve only. zlint lint_mp_ecdsa_pub_key_encoding_correct enforces.
Boulder hardcodes exactly the DV OID 2.23.140.1.2.1 (issuance/cert.go:167-174, 182).
Boulder signs with the issuer's real signer (issuance/cert.go:394) using crypto/x509.CreateCertificate; signature trivially verifies.
issuance/cert.go:320-329 always sets KeyUsage (digitalSignature, plus keyEncipherment for RSA).
Boulder's emitted extensions are all defined for the public Internet (BR/RFC 5280).
Go's crypto/x509 ECDSA AlgorithmIdentifiers omit parameters. zlint lint_mp_ecdsa_signature_encoding_correct verifies.
Applies to IV/OV/EV certs only; LE issues only DV.
Boulder hardcodes the DV policy OID (issuance/cert.go:167-174); anyPolicy is never added.

linter/lints/common.go defines BRDay = 86400 * time.Second (common.go:20) and validity is computed in seconds throughout (issuance/cert.go:107-116, 141). The cpcps lint subscriber_cert_validity_greater_than_100_days uses BRDay.
Go's crypto/x509.CreateCertificate emits AKI from issuer.SubjectKeyId, which is set on Boulder's intermediate issuer certificates. zlint lint_ext_authority_key_identifier_no_key_identifier enforces.
issuance/issuer.go:238-240 requires the CRLURLBase to start with 'http://'.

ra ValidationProfile.MaxNames is config-required with bounds [1,100] (ra/ra.go:254-259). cpcps lint e_cert_has_san_count_out_of_bounds enforces 1..100 against the linting cert (linter/lints/cpcps/lint_cert_has_san_count_out_of_bounds.go:39).
Go's crypto/x509 emits EKU non-critical. zlint lint_eku_critical / lint_eku_critical_improperly enforce.
issuance/cert.go:300-309 includes ExtKeyUsageClientAuth unless OmitClientAuth is configured.
SHOULD NOT thresholds. Boulder's cap (<100 days) is well under 397 days and at the 99-day SHOULD threshold for the 2027 window. Validity is config-driven; production CP/CPS sets it to <=100 days.
goodkey's goodCurve only permits NIST P-256/P-384/P-521 (good_key.go:271-284); Curve25519/Curve448 rejected.
crypto/x509 does not emit issuerUniqueID. zlint lint_cert_contains_unique_identifier enforces.

Go's crypto/x509 doesn't populate AuthorityCertIssuer. zlint mozilla lint_mp_authority_key_identifier_correct (vendor/.../mozilla/lint_mp_authority_key_identifier_correct.go) enforces that AKI doesn't contain both keyID and cert-issuer.
Same as 4.6.5; emailProtection never included.
issuance/issuer.go:212-227 only emits SHA-2 family hashes (SHA-256/SHA-384). MD5 and SHA-1 are never selected.

issuance/cert.go:320-329: KeyUsage extension is present, critical (Go default), asserts digitalSignature; for RSA also keyEncipherment (configurably omitted via OmitKeyEncipherment); never asserts other bits.
issuance/cert.go:188-193 sets Value: asn1.NullBytes (0x05 0x00).
Boulder never asserts dataEncipherment.
policy/pa.go validNonWildcardDomain rejects names ending in '.' (pa.go:246-248).

issuance/issuer.go NewCertificate requires ic.IsCA (issuer.go:78), but the operational deployment loads only intermediate signing certs as issuers, never roots. LE's issuance configuration ties subscriber profiles to intermediate issuers.
